text.first: My name is Anna Afanaseva. I have three children, two cats, and a long personal and professional journey that has brought me to where I am today. I spent most of my life in Russia, and now I live and work in northern Spain, in Asturias.
text.second: For many years, I worked as an educator in non-profit organisations, public schools, and private schools. I worked with teenagers from different social backgrounds, organised live-action role-playing games, and ran youth camps. Back in 2015, I discovered the Feldenkrais Method. I was deeply impressed by its depth, wholeness, respect for the individual, and remarkable effectiveness. That was how my path as a Feldenkrais practitioner began.
